// @ts-ignore TS6133 import { expect, test } from "vitest"; import * as z from "zod/v3"; const schema = z.nan(); test("passing validations", () => { schema.parse(Number.NaN); schema.parse(Number("Not a number")); }); test("failing validations", () => { expect(() => schema.parse(5)).toThrow(); expect(() => schema.parse("John")).toThrow(); expect(() => schema.parse(true)).toThrow(); expect(() => schema.parse(null)).toThrow(); expect(() => schema.parse(undefined)).toThrow(); expect(() => schema.parse({})).toThrow(); expect(() => schema.parse([])).toThrow(); });
